title: Stripe Webhook Handler
description: ARCHETYPE: webhook_handler. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no login/signup scaffold), one POST endpoint on a /webhook/* path, saves incoming payload to an Events table, returns { received: true }. DO NOT build auth, pages, or CRUD endpoints — this is a single-purpose receiver, not an app. Path: POST /webhook/stripe. Incoming body: { type, amount, customer_email, signature }. Check that a 'signature' field exists on the request (that's enough — no real HMAC needed for the test). Persist with fields event_type, amount, customer_email, received_at (auto). Respond with { received: true }.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Events table:
  event_type, required
  amount (number), default 0
  customer_email
  received_at_date, auto

# Your webhook endpoint here — single POST /webhook/stripe that saves the event
